reasoning: Arre, I have no choice, beta. TMC promised me citizenship in 2011, in 2014 — they gave me nothing but broken words and internal fighting, so how can I vote for them again? Shantanu is my man, he brought CAA, Modi gave the law in December 2019, and I still believe the notification will come — not this fourteen certificates nonsense five days before election, but real papers. These fourteen certificates feel like a token, like Modi is showing his work just in time for my vote, but I will vote BJP anyway because what else can I do? The Left, the Congress — they are old history for me. I am tired, I am seventy-one, I have waited seventy years to stop being called a refugee, and only Modi has the power to finish this. So I vote BJP, I vote Shantanu, and I pray that after this election, the notification comes and I finally hold my citizenship paper in my hand.
primary_drivers: CAA implementation and actual citizenship papers after 70 years
TMC's broken promises in 2011-2014; complete loss of faith in them
Shantanu Thakur as the Matua/CAA candidate and representation of his community
